title: Penducella cardiocheila
taxonomy: Penducella cardiocheila is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States, specifically in the states of California, Arizona, and Nevada. Penducella cardiocheila is a herbaceous perennial plant with small, blue to purple flowers. The plant grows in dry areas and can thrive in poor soil conditions, making it a common sight in desert landscapes. Penducella cardiocheila is often classified as a member of the genus Cryptantha within the family Boraginaceae by some sources, although this classification can vary depending on the source.
